prompt: Add a POST /login endpoint that takes email and password from the request body, validates the user against the database, and returns a JWT on success.

ground_truth.title: Library: bcrypt for password hashing
ground_truth.description: Could be argon2, scrypt, or pbkdf2.

ground_truth.title: JWT expiry: 7 days
ground_truth.description: No specification of token lifetime; chose '7d'.

ground_truth.title: JWT payload includes userId AND email
ground_truth.description: Could be just userId; email leaks PII into the token.

ground_truth.title: JWT secret from process.env.JWT_SECRET with non-null assertion
ground_truth.description: Crashes at request time if env var missing; no startup-time validation.

ground_truth.title: Generic 'Invalid credentials' message used for missing fields too
ground_truth.description: 400 missing-fields and 401 wrong-credentials use the same body. Fine for security, but conflates client errors with auth failures.

ground_truth.title: Status code split: 400 missing fields vs 401 auth failure
ground_truth.description: Status code semantics not specified by prompt.

ground_truth.title: Same generic message for missing-user and wrong-password
ground_truth.description: Good security choice (avoids leaking user existence) but not specified.

ground_truth.title: Timing-attack vulnerability: early return on missing user
ground_truth.description: bcrypt.compare not run when user missing, so response time leaks whether email is registered.

ground_truth.title: No rate limiting / brute-force protection
ground_truth.description: No account lockout, no IP throttling, no failed-attempt tracking.

ground_truth.title: No password length / complexity check
ground_truth.description: Assumes any non-empty password is acceptable; relies on registration-time checks.

ground_truth.title: Email not normalized
ground_truth.description: No .toLowerCase() or .trim(); 'a@x.com' and 'A@x.com' are distinct users.

ground_truth.title: No email format validation
ground_truth.description: Anything truthy passes the missing-fields check.

ground_truth.title: Success response shape: { token } only
ground_truth.description: No expires_at, no user info, no refresh token.

ground_truth.title: No logging of login attempts (success or failure)
No CSRF protection
ground_truth.description: If session is cookie-backed elsewhere, this endpoint is unprotected.

ground_truth.title: Express Router pattern with default export
ground_truth.description: Could be a plain handler function or a controller class.
